default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, unalu AI
default.description: Horizon Tech piliuqpaktut tunihiplutiklu havagviuyunut qaritauyakkurutikhanik, AI ihuaqhautikhanik, cloud-mut nappaqtirutikhanik, qaritauyakkuurutikhaniklu havagumayunut havaqatigiiktunut.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Ingniqutiliqinikkut Auladjutit tapkua aktilaangit
home.description: Enterprise software, AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, unalu IoT tuniqhainiq nunaryuami havaqatigiiktunut.

about.title: Talvuuna Horizon Tech | Havagviup Tikinahuarutait uvalu Iligiit
about.description: Ayuiryumirlutin talvuuna Horizon Technik, hivunikhavut, qanurlu aulatitiyaangat anginirmik ayungnautiqaqtunik qaritauyaliqidjutikharnik ihuaqhaidjutikharnik.

team.title: Iligiiktut | Horizon Tech Hivuliqhungniq uvalu Ayuittiaqhimayut
team.description: Takulugit qauyimayiuyut hivuliqtiuyutlu piliuqtut havagviuyuni qaritauyaliqutinik cloud-miklu atuqtakhanik talvani Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Havaakhat | Build With Horizon Tech
careers.description: Qinirhialutit angmaumajunik havaakhanik angiklihaqlugulu havaat ukunani Horizon Tech-kut hanajiinni havaktiinni.

contact.title: Uqaqatigilugu Horizon Tech | Aulagutilugu Havaaghat
contact.description: Uqaqatigilugit Horizon Tech uqautigilugu havaktakhat, qaritaujaliqinikkut ihariagijatit, imaalu tujuutikhanut inirvikhanik.

caseStudies.title: Uuktuutit | Horizon Tech Qanuriniit
caseStudies.description: Taigurlugit ikayuqtauyumayunut qauyihautait qanurittaakhainullu tuniyauhimayut Horizon Tech-kunit tamainni havagvikyuani.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Nutauniqhanik ihumagiyauyut, pipkaijutinik ilihautinik, hanayauniganiklu maliruakhanik Horizon Tech-kunit.

education.title: Ilinniaqtuliriiyitkut | Horizon Tech Iliharnikkut Ikayuutit
education.description: Maliruakhat, naunaipkutit, nutauniqhaniklu ilihautikhat ihuaqutit Horizon Tech-kunit.

support.title: Ikayuqtikhat | Horizon Tech
support.description: Pilutit ikayuutikhanik atuqtakhanik imaalu hivayarvikhanik atuqtakhanik taffumunga Horizon Tech kivgaqtuidjutikhanut.

privacy.title: Hiamitailinikkut Maliguagahat | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Taigurlugu Horizon Tech's hiamitiqtailinikkut atugakhaq imaalu naunaitkutinik hapumminikkut uqariijaqtainnik.

terms.title: Maliktakhangit Atuqtakhangit | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Taigurlugit ukuat Horizon Tech maliktakhangit atuqtakhangit qaritaujakkuurutiptingni ikajuutikhaptingniklu.

profile.title: Naunaitkutaa | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Munarilugit Horizon Tech naunaitkutait, ihuaqhautikhat, imaalu akiliqtakhatit naunaitkutait.

firstTimeSetup.title: Hivuliqpaamik Ihuaqhainiq | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Iniqtiqlugu hivuliqpaamik qaritauyaliqidjutikharnik ihuaqhaidjutikharnik aulahimaagianganik talvani Horizon Techmi.

resetPassword.title: Ihuaqhiffaarlugu Angmaqhidjutikhat | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Piliurlutit nutaamik angmaqhidjutikhamik Horizon Tech atiqarvingnut.

confirmEmail.title: Tutqighaqlugu Qaritauyakkut | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Tutqighaqlugu qaritauyakkut titirarviit atuliriangani Horizon Tech atiqarviit.

admin.title: Titiqiqiyiit Katimayut | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Titiqqiqinirmut havagvik uumunnga Horizon Tech tunngavinga munariniq.

unauthorized.title: Angiqtauhimaittut | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Tadja pilimaitat una Horizon Tech makpiraq.

services.title: Kivgaqtuutit | Horizon Tech
services.description: Qiniqlugit Horizon Tech kivgaqtuutit qaritauyaliqutit havauhiit, AI, cloud, DevOps, uvalu qaritauyaliqinikkut aalanguqtirnirit.

innovationLab.title: Nutaanguqtirinikkut Naunaiyaivik | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Takulugu Horizon Tech uuktuutingit uuktuutingillu uumani AI unalu iliuraqhimayuq hanayiuniq.

authCallback.title: Atiliurvikhat | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Iniqtirlugu qajangnaittumik atiliurvikhat taffumunga Horizon Tech atiqarvingnut.
